programme.title: Give Me Shelter - Film
programme.desc: Celebrities are on a mission to save animals caught in the crosshairs of human arrogance and greed.

programme.title: Blue World Ep804: Deep Wrecks in Lake Champlain + Denver’s High Altitude Aquarium
programme.desc: In Lake Champlain, Blue World explores wrecks that are so deep; there is no natural light on them--ever. Then we travel to an aquarium a mile above sea level to meet some high-altitude sharks and sawfish!

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep205: Vintage Boat Show + Flyboarding Wake Surfing in Muskoka, Ontario - Canada
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, checks out Muskoka’s rich boating history from steamships to Canada’s largest vintage boat show and gives wake surfing and flyboarding a try!

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep101: Shark Business
programme.desc: Shark Business unravels some of the mysteries surrounding sharks with controversial behaviorist Dr. Erich Ritter. You'll witness divers testing the limits of shark-human interaction outside of cages with dangerous sharks such as lemon, bull and even great white sharks!

programme.title: Hot Water Ep106: Jet Sprinting V8 Championships - Australia
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports. This episode features Round 6 of Jet Sprinting from Cabarita in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep304: Moomba Masters Waterski Championships – Melbourne, Australia
programme.desc: Event highlights from the Moomba Masters - Women's Men’s Slalom Trick Waterskiing in Melbourne, Australia

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Experiencing Argentina Waters
programme.desc: Old and new friends meet at Le Fario Lodge in Argentina for an amazing fishing adventure. The waters of Argentina are excellent fly fishing for wild and large brown, rainbow, and brook trout in pristine, untouched environments.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep102: Whale Sharks + Shark Hunting
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Whale Sharks in Mexico, explores a shark hunting ritual 300 Miles off the coast of Costa Rica, and takes a Deeper Dive studying shark attacks, Whitetip Reef Sharks and Oceanic Whitetip Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep111: Shark Nation
programme.desc: There's no doubt sharks have an image problem. And they're certainly in trouble globally. The population of some species has declined by more than 90% due to over fishing. But there's still one place in the world where sharks thrive – the Bahamas. Sharks not only prosper there, they are highly protected. It’s illegal to kill them.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Golden Shivers
programme.desc: Atoms and Void is formed in the songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. “Golden Shivers” is a beautiful piece of ambient electronic music akin to the works of minimalist composers Steve Reich and Meredith Monk. Good for running, dancing, driving, and doing the dishes. Play loud.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Futureproof
programme.desc: In shred world, Absinthe Films’ "Futureproof" is widely regarded as a stone cold classic. This movie showcases iconic performances from many of the best riders to ever do it, including Romain De Marchi, JP Solberg, Trevor Andrew Wolfgang Nyvelt and Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Nippow Holiday
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen invites the filmmaker and musician, Leo Cittadella, to join him and Rip Zinger on a powder trip to Hokkaido, Japan. Along the way, they meet up with Nicolas Müller and Mikkel Bang to film for the Absinthe Films feature "TurboDojo.”

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Two
programme.desc: The snowboarders Rip Zinger and Terje Haakonsen ride powder in Japan. Years after his recovery from a debilitating head injury, they get Kevin Pearce back on snow. Join us for this episode of friendship, freshies, and freeriding.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Three
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen explores the joys of Japanese mountain culture with his friends Kevin Pearce, Mikkel Bang, Rip Zinger, Oli Gittler, Curtis Ciszek, Leo Cittadella and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Half Banked at Mt Baker
programme.desc: Terje and Leo Cittadella head to Mt. Baker, Washington to meet up with with Russell Winfield and Rip Zinger to compete in the 33rd Legendary Banked Slalom. During a windstorm, a tree falls on the house while everyone is asleep. Terje gets waxing tips from Olympic gold medalist Seth Westcott.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Attunga - A Higher Place
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three Norwegian snowboarders: legendary purist Terje Haakonsen, holistic-minded Torgeir Bergrem, and carefree wunderkind Marcus Kleveland. Watch as filmmaker and snowboarder Seth Huot pulls back the curtain to examine their common purpose, potential, pitfalls, and paychecks.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NowHere
programme.desc: A 2010 winter journey with riders facing harsh conditions and deeper questions. This Absinthe Films documentary explores perception, purpose, and the fine line between feeling lost and finding where you truly belong.

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 1
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: Leonardo Bonucci is keeping the great tradition of Italian central defenders alive. Goran Pandev retires as a legend, and we discover the stars who pay as much attention to their hairstyles as their skills!

programme.title: Chill
programme.desc: We are on the waters of Mandurah, in Australia, for the men's finals of the IWWF Wakeboard World. Morocco is our next destination for the kitesurf world tour, and we present Harley Clifford who storms wakeboarding.

programme.title: Sports Woman
programme.desc: Simone Biles is the most decorated American gymnast and, despite the scandal surrounding the doctor Larry Nasser and US team, she is determined to contest the Tokyo Olympic Games.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: In the arena of gymnastics and beyond, Olympic gold medal winner Simone Biles has proven she was a champion worthy of the name.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: We look at the icons of extreme sports. Like cliff diver Rhiannan Iffland, stuntman Evel Knievel, skater Tony Hawk and mountain biker Nino Schurter.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock
programme.desc: The Monaco F1 Grand Prix is a notable date in the calendar of the stars. Karen goes around with her mike and introduces you to the greatest drivers: Button, Rosberg and, of course, her husband!

programme.title: Karen on the Rock
programme.desc: Karen Minier – the wife of F1 champion David Coulthard – invites you to the heart of the most glamorous events in Monaco! Meet Cristiano Ronaldo, Thierry Henry and Zlatan Ibrahimovic!

programme.title: Karen on the Rock
programme.desc: Karen Minier - wife of F1 champion David Coulthard - takes you to meet stars of aquatic sports like diver Pierre Frolla, surfer Jordi Smith and kitesurf champion Alice Brunacci.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock
programme.desc: Join Karen Minier – wife of F1 champion David Coulthard – and meet the most in-form athletes of the moment, like Olympic heptathlon champion Jessica Ennis or multi-medal winning pole vaulter Yelena Isinbayeva.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock
programme.desc: Karen Minier - the wife of F1 champion David Coulthard - invites you to the heart of the most glamorous events! To South Korea, with Mark Webber and Miles Daisher!

programme.title: Karen on the Rock
programme.desc: Karen Minier – the wife of F1 champion David Coulthard – invites you to the heart of the most glamorous events in Monaco! Between two shopping sprees, swim alongside Melanie Marshall and Steve Parry and train with Lolo Jones!

programme.title: Silent Revolution
programme.desc: A documentary series exploring the European BMX scene, following riders across competitions, training, and daily life to reveal the dedication, culture, and challenges behind professional BMX.

programme.title: Temporary Autonomy Zone
programme.desc: For their fourth full movie Temporary Autonomy Zone the Gpsy Feelin’ boys focus on the riders’ life in a society that destroys him more than it helps him.

programme.title: The Long Hope
programme.desc: A top climber attempts a historic one-day ascent of a legendary sea cliff, while the story revisits the original first ascent 40 years earlier, contrasting extreme modern climbing with the legacy of a pioneering climber returning one last time.

programme.title: Tomorrow Will Be Better
programme.desc: Czech freestyle motocross star Libor Podmol is proof that the wildest dreams come true. In January, 2010 he flies to the US, buys a Suzuki 250 two-stroke, becomes 6 times world champ and signs a sponsorship deal with Rockstar Energy.

programme.title: Discovering Karpathos - Part 2
programme.desc: We take a stroll down the village of Arkansa, in the middle of Karpathos. The village is loved by tourists who have been coming for over 20 years. Then, we are going to explore some of the ruins of the island, starting in the north in the ancient Vrikous. The island is filled with Ancient Greek ruins we cannot miss on before boarding on a windsurf experience. With the Meltemi wind, Karpathos has become a windsurfing paradise.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this year's season of Kite Maters we follow the life of Toni Vodisek, an athlete that has everything needed to become a star and win multiple titles. He has already won three World Series events in a row and found himself close to the podium spots at the end of the year. Also we talk with Guy Bridge: a Professional Kite foil rider that tells us what it takes to become one of the best.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: We follow one of the most recognizable figures in the kite family: Florian Gruber. We’ll hear the story from the man behind the successful transformation of kiteboarding; from a bevy of kiteboarders spending their free time casually competing, to an Olympic Sailing Class. We also dive into the equipment of kitesurf and how it has evolved over time.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Nastro Rosa Tour - Review
programme.desc: A sports format, innovative and spectacular. An international tour along the mediterranean coasts and lighthouses of the Mediterranean sea.A series of multi-disciplinary sailing events, in an exclusive Italian concept consisting of stages that will touch some of the most beautiful Italian and Mediterranean coastal resorts.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E02 - Nature's World Wide Web
programme.desc: When animals share info to help each other decide, it's called animal communication. They use stuff like sounds, colors, body language, movements, electric signs, touches, smells, or a mix of these. Whether it's a sea anemone spreading its tentacles or a male lion considering approaching a mate, their skill in communicating can be vital for their success. This episode dives into how animals interact with one another.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E19 - Road Warrior
programme.desc: Wardens set up a decoy to stop road hunting in Montana U.S.A. Region 7. It's not long before they catch a shooter.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E20 - Last Hurrah
programme.desc: A veteran warden from Region 5 in Montana works his last season.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E11 - Counter Terrorism
programme.desc: Following the September 11 attacks, military presence became commonplace in New York and other American cities, and the counter terrorism forces were effectively given a “blank cheque” when it came to ensuring that another terrorist incident would never take place on American soil. This episode of CQB takes an in–depth look at who was selected to occupy elite anti-terrorist positions, what they were trained for, and how they were equipped: when opposing forces are using commercial airliners and chemical weapons, countermeasures are by necessity complicated and varied. CQB takes an intimate look at what it was like to be an officer on alert for chemical attacks in Washington DC, or an army reservist monitoring suspicious activities on the streets of NYC.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E12 - French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: No country other than France operates an elite military force that invites foreign nationals to serve in its ranks. With a reputation for being a safe haven for individuals with questionable pasts, the French Foreign Legion is a true mercenary army that has garnered significant respect within the global special operations community. This episode of CQB examines a raid by the Foreign Legion on a small airport in Iraq during the 1990 Gulf War, exploring the nature of the Legion, how it differs from other special forces, and how it prepares for a wide variety of close quarter battle scenarios in conflict situations around the world.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila offers Patricia to hand over the video, only if she betrays Fausto and gives it to the police. Patricia tells Camila that her mother was not such a saint and that she was the cause of this war between the families, because of her relationship with two men at the same time. Fausto hires Anton again to kill his wife.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Alberto arrives at the park where Lorena is with Norma and Ignacio. It seems to him that it is time for forgiveness and he tells her what he did with Claudio and Gertrudis, following the advice she gave him; now he feels relieved and ready to move on. Alberto, kneeling before her, proposes to Lorena with a ring in his hands. She accepts happily. "He who forgives offense, cultivates love..." End.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena and Guillermo argue in what seems to be their daily routine. In the back room of an antique shop, Claudio Corona hires a Mafioso to kill his brother Marco Aurelio so he can take possession of his goods. Lorena learns that her husband is a hitman. To recover her kidnapped son, Lorena must commit a crime.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In front of Elisenda, Pastora reveals that Misael has always been special to her; Israel has challenged him to death.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In the presence of Pastora, Raúl, Octavia, Pereto, Manuel Jesús, Baudillo, Edilio and Cepeda, Israel and Misael raise their weapons.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Pressured by Matilde, Carlos Raul explains that, although he intends to take care of his son, he will not give up his intention to get Adriana back.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana is thrilled to see the beautiful evening that Carlos Raul has prepared for her; the couple is carried away by their feelings and consummate the deep love they have for each other.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina visita a la Madre Isabel para hablarle sobre su relación con Rosa Blanco, quien fue su mejor amiga y ella la traicionó; por eso quiere impedir su regreso.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante una llamada telefónica de Rosa Blanco a Luciano, Camila, ilusionada, quiere hablar con su mamá. El Capitán Torrealba la ayude a entender los secretos que existen sobre el crimen. Ante la brutal agresión a Sebastián, Ezequiel quiere vengarla con Fernando, un Aragón.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Reto Sangriento
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes investigadores de fenómenos paranormales reciben el reto de pasar un fin de semana en una casa donde habitan seres malignos. Esto con el fin de presentar las evidencias en su programa de televisión y levantar el rating, pero lo que no saben es que el reto les costara muy caro.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: El Campeón
programme.desc: LA HISTORIA DE UNA PROMESA DEL BOXEO, SU ENTRENADOR SOLO LO USA PARA BENEFICIO PROPIO. LA FAMA Y EL DINERO SOLO LE TRAE PROBLEMAS, ADEMAS QUE SUFAMILIA SE APROVECHA DE EL.

programme.title: Gritos del Monday
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de Ingeniería Ambiental realizan un trabajo en la Reserva Ecológica de los Saltos del Monday, conocido por su rica fauna y su rica historia. Para el trabajo, los alumnos deciden acampar en el lugar, en medio de la obscura noche son sorprendidos por un hecho que desencadenará a lo largo de sus días posteriores, en especial a una de las estudiantes.

programme.title: Choele
programme.desc: Todo ocurre en el pueblo de Choele Choel, provincia de Río Negro. Un niño y su padre intentan seguir juntos todo el verano, pero el chico ya decidió partir hacia otro lugar con su madre, cuando ésta llegue y le recoja. A la zona donde viven llega una chica, por la que comienzan a competir padre e hijo.

programme.title: Cuernavaca
programme.desc: El mundo de Andy cambia totalmente cuando su madre tiene un accidente. Sin nadie que lo cuide, es llevado a Cuernavaca, a la casa de su desconocida abuela paterna. Mientras su madre se debate entre la vida y la muerte, el niño se enfrentará a la frialdad de su abuela, al mundo seductor y peligroso del hijo del jardinero y a la búsqueda de su padre

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
